mapper.sql: CustomerNo, UserNo, CstmName, CstmType, CstmGrade, StateCode, IndCode, PrjCode, EtpOfJp, LgealRep, CAddress1, CAddress2, PostCode, TelNoFirst, TelNoLast, FaxNoFirst, FaxNoLast, ContactPsn, ContPsnDuty, ContDept, Bank, TaxNo, AccountNo, DeptCode, PsnSMCID, PriceLvl, FileDate, UpdDate, ObInvoice, EAddress, InvFlag, Remark, Requirement, AgentNo, StockFlag, InvAgent, VIPCode, Laji, VIPCode_Cn, EndUser_Type, Beijian, PeiTao, Phone_first, Phone_Last, Restrict_Cust, Delivery_Flag, AgentType, DeliveryType, LicenceNo, NoLicence, BelongedGroup, StatementEmail, InvoiceAddress, IndCode_GroupId, IndCode_PointRate, UnUse_Flag, CustomerNO_NC, RiskTip, SurvivalStatusDescription, RegisteredCapital, ContributedCapital, CompanyTypeDescription, MarketCategoryCode, HLCode, TradeCompanyId, SMCGroupID
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.Customer_2del
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.Customer_2del (CustomerNo, UserNo, CstmName, CstmType, CstmGrade, StateCode, IndCode, PrjCode, EtpOfJp, LgealRep, CAddress1, CAddress2, PostCode, TelNoFirst, TelNoLast, FaxNoFirst, FaxNoLast, ContactPsn, ContPsnDuty, ContDept, Bank, TaxNo, AccountNo, DeptCode, PsnSMCID, PriceLvl, FileDate, UpdDate, ObInvoice, EAddress, InvFlag, Remark, Requirement, AgentNo, StockFlag, InvAgent, VIPCode, Laji, VIPCode_Cn, EndUser_Type, Beijian, PeiTao, Phone_first, Phone_Last, Restrict_Cust, Delivery_Flag, AgentType, DeliveryType, LicenceNo, NoLicence, BelongedGroup, MarketCategoryCode, HLCode, TradeCompanyId, SMCGroupID) values (#{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{userno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cstmname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{cstmtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cstmgrade,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{indcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prjcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{etpofjp,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lgealrep,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{obinvoice,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{eaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{requirement,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{agentno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{stockflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{indcodeGroupid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{indcodePointrate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unuseFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{customernoNc,jdbcType=NCHAR}, #{risktip,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, update dbo.Customer_2del
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
UserNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=CHAR},
CstmName = #{record.cstmname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CstmType = #{record.cstmtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
CstmGrade = #{record.cstmgrade,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
StateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IndCode = #{record.indcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

TelNoLast = #{record.telnolast,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

FaxNoLast = #{record.faxnolast,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContactPsn = #{record.contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

TaxNo = #{record.taxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AccountNo = #{record.accountno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptCode = #{record.deptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PsnSMCID = #{record.psnsmcid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PriceLvl = #{record.pricelvl,jdbcType=CHAR},
FileDate = #{record.filedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UpdDate = #{record.upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ObInvoice = #{record.obinvoice,jdbcType=CHAR},
EAddress = #{record.eaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvFlag = #{record.invflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Requirement = #{record.requirement,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
AgentNo = #{record.agentno,jdbcType=CHAR},
StockFlag = #{record.stockflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
InvAgent = #{record.invagent,jdbcType=CHAR},
VIPCode = #{record.vipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Laji = #{record.laji,jdbcType=CHAR},
VIPCode_Cn = #{record.vipcodeCn,jdbcType=CHAR},

Phone_Last = #{record.phoneLast,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Restrict_Cust = #{record.restrictCust,jdbcType=CHAR},
Delivery_Flag = #{record.deliveryFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
AgentType = #{record.agenttype,jdbcType=CHAR},
DeliveryType = #{record.deliverytype,jdbcType=CHAR},
LicenceNo = #{record.licenceno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
NoLicence = #{record.nolicence,jdbcType=BIT},
BelongedGroup = #{record.belongedgroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StatementEmail = #{record.statementemail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvoiceAddress = #{record.invoiceaddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
IndCode_GroupId = #{record.indcodeGroupid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IndCode_PointRate = #{record.indcodePointrate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UnUse_Flag = #{record.unuseFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},

SurvivalStatusDescription = #{record.survivalstatusdescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

update dbo.Customer_2del
UserNo = #{userno,jdbcType=CHAR},
CstmName = #{cstmname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CstmType = #{cstmtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
CstmGrade = #{cstmgrade,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

IndCode = #{indcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

CAddress2 = #{caddress2,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
PostCode = #{postcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
TelNoFirst = #{telnofirst,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TelNoLast = #{telnolast,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FaxNoFirst = #{faxnofirst,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FaxNoLast = #{faxnolast,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContactPsn = #{contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ContPsnDuty = #{contpsnduty,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ContDept = #{contdept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Bank = #{bank,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
TaxNo = #{taxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AccountNo = #{accountno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptCode = #{deptcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PsnSMCID = #{psnsmcid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PriceLvl = #{pricelvl,jdbcType=CHAR},
FileDate = #{filedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UpdDate = #{upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ObInvoice = #{obinvoice,jdbcType=CHAR},
EAddress = #{eaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvFlag = #{invflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Requirement = #{requirement,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

StockFlag = #{stockflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
InvAgent = #{invagent,jdbcType=CHAR},

VIPCode_Cn = #{vipcodeCn,jdbcType=CHAR},

Phone_Last = #{phoneLast,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

Delivery_Flag = #{deliveryFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
AgentType = #{agenttype,jdbcType=CHAR},
DeliveryType = #{deliverytype,jdbcType=CHAR},
LicenceNo = #{licenceno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
NoLicence = #{nolicence,jdbcType=BIT},
BelongedGroup = #{belongedgroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StatementEmail = #{statementemail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvoiceAddress = #{invoiceaddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
IndCode_GroupId = #{indcodeGroupid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IndCode_PointRate = #{indcodePointrate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UnUse_Flag = #{unuseFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
CustomerNO_NC = #{customernoNc,jdbcType=NCHAR},
RiskTip = #{risktip,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
SurvivalStatusDescription = #{survivalstatusdescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
RegisteredCapital = #{registeredcapital,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ContributedCapital = #{contributedcapital,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CompanyTypeDescription = #{companytypedescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
MarketCategoryCode = #{marketcategorycode,jdbcType=CHAR},
HLCode = #{hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TradeCompanyId = #{tradecompanyid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
SMCGroupID = #{smcgroupid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
where CustomerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}
